description: HTML conversion review examples generated in CI. Download the artifact and open html-examples/index.html, or open an example compare.html to view the source PDF and generated HTML side by side.

examples.title: arxiv-sample
examples.notes: Existing multi-page regression fixture. This is useful for seeing current fixed-layout HTML behavior on a real paper-style PDF.

examples.title: 4PP highlighting fixture
examples.notes: Readable multi-column fixture with repeated text blocks and highlighted line labels.

examples.title: PDFBOX-2333 AcroForm alignment fixture
examples.notes: Public Apache PDFBox form fixture used to review semantic AcroForm controls, aligned labels, field geometry, and appearance suppression.

examples.title: Ghent PR Word-layout sample
examples.notes: Ghent Workgroup press release with embedded fonts, mixed emphasis, links, images, and page decoration.

examples.title: Ghent Output Suite 5.0 PDF/X-4 assembled test page
examples.notes: Six assembled Ghent test pages exercising color, shadings, overprint, DeviceN, fonts, masks, and complex graphics.
